result.summary: Campfire exposes a documented REST API and a streamable-http MCP server at `https://api.meetcampfire.com/mcp`, both publicly documented and requiring a Campfire-issued API token.
result.description: Campfire is an AI-native ERP and accounting platform for finance teams. It provides general ledger, revenue automation, reconciliation, reporting, and AI-assisted accounting workflows.

campfire_api_key.label: Campfire API token
campfire_api_key.setup: Sign in to your Campfire instance, open [API Tokens](https://app.meetcampfire.com/v2/settings/api-keys) (`Settings` → `API Keys`), create an API user, then click `Create API Key` for that user. Copy the key when shown; the docs say you can only see it once. Roles determine access: `admin`, `clerk`, or `view only`. Use it as `Authorization: Token YOUR_API_KEY`.

surfaces.name: Campfire MCP server
surfaces.notes: The MCP endpoint itself returns an authentication hint that also mentions `Authorization: Bearer <cognito_token>`, but the public docs only document API-token authentication.
